rule.desc: Tests should be independent and runnable in any order.

examples.example: No shared mutable state across tests.

rule.desc: Unit tests should be fast (<1s each).

examples.example: Stub slow network or disk operations.

rule.desc: Extract common test utilities to helper functions or fixtures.
Use doc-tests where supported to validate examples.

examples.example: Run examples in documentation as tests.

rule.desc: Consider property-based testing for complex logic.

examples.example: Generate random inputs to validate invariants.
Red (failing test) → Green (make it pass) → Refactor.

rule.desc: Aim for high coverage of business logic (80%+).
rule.exceptions: Prioritize critical paths over trivial getters/setters.
